soldier.name: Soldier
soldier.description: A combat-focused career path. Soldiers excel in weapons systems, tactical maneuvering, and ship-to-ship warfare. They are the backbone of any fleet engagement.

explorer.name: Explorer
explorer.description: Explorers specialize in scanning, hacking, and traversing unknown space. They map new systems and uncover hidden sites. A lone wolf by nature.

industrialist.name: Industrialist
industrialist.description: Industrialists are the builders and producers of the galaxy. They mine, manufacture, and trade goods. Always start with a destroyer hull for maximum cargo and fitting potential.

trader.name: Trader
trader.description: Traders make their fortune through commerce and logistics. They buy low, sell high, and run goods across dangerous trade routes.

shuttle.name: Starter Shuttle
shuttle.description: A basic shuttle for emergency transport. Minimal fitting and cargo.

frigate.name: Starter Frigate
frigate.description: A versatile light combat vessel. Fast and agile with moderate firepower.

destroyer.name: Starter Destroyer
destroyer.description: A heavier combat platform with more firepower and fitting room. Industrialists prefer these for their expanded capabilities.
